home cv blog dev-projects

Developer projects

  • The Geo Array Digest (GAD) service

    service

    Periodic digests of public data from the Gene Expression Omnibus.

  • The lute R package

    r/bioc package

    Resource for simulation and development of deconvolution methods.

  • The recountmethylation Bioconductor package

    r/bioc package

    Access and analyze large compilations of public DNA methylation array datasets.
